caption: A man is seated in a studio setting, wearing a black t-shirt with "CHECK IT!" printed on the chest, a black baseball cap, over-ear headphones, and a gold chain. He sits behind a professional microphone on a stand. Behind him is a white wall featuring a logo with the word "HUSTLE" and several black stars. To his right is a dark background with the text "BOSS TALK 101". On-screen overlays include a logo on the left that reads "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" and a red logo on the right that also reads "BOSS TALK 101". Throughout the sequence, the man is speaking, shifting his head slightly from left to right and adjusting his facial expressions. He maintains a consistent position in the frame, while his mouth moves and his gaze shifts as he addresses someone off-screen.
